description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular form with a dark wood finish on the top and sides, paired with a smooth, matte gray front. The cabinet stands on four slender, black metal legs, giving it a modern and slightly elevated appearance. The front face is divided into two distinct drawers, each with a subtle horizontal seam but no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The wood grain is visible on the top and sides, adding a touch of warmth and texture to the otherwise minimalist design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of wood and metal materials. This piece would fit seamlessly in contemporary urban environments, such as offices or modern home workspaces.
description: A modern, two-drawer filing cabinet with a dark wood top and sides, matte gray front, and black metal legs. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles and a sturdy, elevated structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, matte gray face with two drawer divisions and black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark wood grain top and side panel, with the slim black metal leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood grain surface and the back legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood grain and the open space beneath the cabinet.
